mapper.update: UPDATE MSF_REQUEST_TEMP SET MANAGER_CD='M0002' WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
UPDATE MSF_REQUEST_AGENT_TEMP SET MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN='Y' WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND FORM_TYPE_CD = #{formTypeCd}
UPDATE MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR_TEMP SET CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN_NO='010' WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND FORM_TYPE_CD = #{formTypeCd}
UPDATE MSF_REQUEST_SALE_TEMP SET MODEL_ID='K7777777' WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND FORM_TYPE_CD = #{formTypeCd}
UPDATE MSF_REQUEST_BILL_REQ_TEMP SET REQ_PAY_TYPE_CD='C' WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND FORM_TYPE_CD = #{formTypeCd}
